summary: Cleanup PR for sysdolphin baselib HSD code. It reordered TExp allocation/free helpers near HSD_TExpGetType, rewrote parts of TExpAssignReg into clearer nested conditionals, and renamed SisLib allocator symbols/types/fields from address or unknown names to role names such as HSD_SisLib_Alloc, HSD_SisLib_Free, SisBlock, next, data, free_head, and used_head. A bot report recorded one unmatched-item improvement for HSD_SisLib_Free from 92.57% to 99.82%.

key_files.role: Main SisLib cleanup: renamed allocator functions and allocator list globals, replaced unknown allocation block type/fields with SisBlock/next/data, updated callsites, and removed stale AI/todo match comments.
evidence_refs: diff:sislib.c renames HSD_SisLib_803A5798 -> HSD_SisLib_Alloc and HSD_SisLib_803A594C -> HSD_SisLib_Free
diff:sislib.c changes sislib_UnkAllocData/data_0/data_1 to SisBlock/next/data across allocator and text-buffer code
pr_body: Cleanup and rename some SisLib code, remove unnecessary AI comments

key_files.role: Header updates for recovered SisLib names and prototypes.
Forward declaration rename for the recovered SisLib allocation block type.
evidence_refs: diff:forward.h typedef struct sislib_UnkAllocData sislib_UnkAllocData -> typedef struct SisBlock SisBlock

key_files.role: Symbol table renames for SisLib allocator functions and sbss list-head globals.
TExp cleanup: moved TevAlloc, CnstAlloc, and HSD_TExpFree earlier in the file and expanded compound assignment/error checks in TExpAssignReg into explicit nested conditionals.
evidence_refs: pr_body: TExp adjustments to function order and cleanup of TExpAssignReg
diff:texp.c adds TevAlloc/CnstAlloc/HSD_TExpFree near top and removes same block from later location
diff:texp.c TExpAssignReg changes combined conditions such as AssignColorReg/AssignAlphaReg calls into separate assignment plus val < 0 checks

what_changed: Renamed SisLib allocator functions from address-style names to HSD_SisLib_Alloc and HSD_SisLib_Free in source, header prototypes, callsites, and symbols.txt.
Renamed the SisLib allocation block type from sislib_UnkAllocData to SisBlock and renamed fields data_0/data_1 to next/data.
Renamed two SisLib sbss list-head globals from address-style HSD_SisLib_804D7970/HSD_SisLib_804D7974 to free_head/used_head, with matching extern and symbols.txt updates.
Updated HSD_Text::alloc_data and other SisLib locals to use SisBlock.
Removed comments explicitly described by the PR body as unnecessary AI comments, including stale match-percentage todo comments around allocator functions.
Moved TExp allocation/free helper definitions earlier in texp.c without changing their bodies in the excerpt.
Cleaned TExpAssignReg by splitting compound conditions with assignment side effects into explicit calls and nested val < 0 checks.
Bot report recorded one unmatched item improvement: main/sysdolphin/baselib/sislib HSD_SisLib_Free improved from 92.57% to 99.82%.

smart_moves.text: Kept renames coherent across C source, owning header, forward declaration, and symbols.txt instead of introducing local aliases.
Converted unknown allocator field names into role names only where repeated usage supports list and payload semantics.
evidence_refs: diff:sislib.c free/used list traversal uses next
diff:sislib.c allocator returns and buffer code use data
diff:sislib.h SisBlock has next, data, size

smart_moves.text: Separated TExpAssignReg calls from error checks, making side effects and assertion paths easier to review while preserving the same asserted failure values in the excerpt.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When an address-named helper's callsites consistently show an allocation/free role, a direct semantic rename can be propagated through symbols, prototypes, and callsites rather than hidden behind aliases.
scope: address-named functions with clear callsite roles

decomp_lessons.lesson: Unknown struct fields can be renamed to small structural roles once the local code repeatedly proves pointer-next, payload/data, and size behavior.
evidence_refs: diff:sislib.c free_head and used_head traversal via next
diff:sislib.c allocation returns best->data and buffer code stores alloc->data

decomp_lessons.lesson: Cleanup PRs can improve matching progress while also removing stale match notes; however, only the specific bot-reported improvement should be treated as validated evidence.
evidence_refs: diff:sislib.c removes todo comments citing old match percentages

naming_conventions.convention: Recovered HSD SisLib allocator functions use HSD_SisLib_<Verb> names, shown here by HSD_SisLib_Alloc and HSD_SisLib_Free.
Recovered local allocator block type uses a semantic PascalCase struct name, SisBlock, instead of sislib_UnkAllocData.
Linked-list allocator fields use next/data/size role names where local behavior supports them.
Allocator list-head globals were named by role as free_head and used_head.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Function-order adjustment in texp.c: TevAlloc, CnstAlloc, and HSD_TExpFree were moved earlier in the translation unit, described by the PR body as TExp function order adjustment.
evidence_refs: pr_body: TExp adjustments to function order
diff:texp.c helper block moved from after HSD_TExpUnref to near HSD_TExpGetType

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: TExpAssignReg compound conditions were expanded so assignment-producing helper calls happen before explicit val < 0 checks; this is a readability/control-flow cleanup tactic visible in the diff, not a claimed match by itself.
evidence_refs: diff:texp.c TExpAssignReg cleanup around HSD_ASSERT lines 0x47B, 0x488, 0x49D, 0x4A6, 0x4B6, 0x4C2, 0x4CF, 0x4D8

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: SisLib cleanup replaced magic struct-size expression 0xC in one allocator coalesce calculation with sizeof(SisBlock), tying pointer math to the recovered type.

No human review comments or review records were present in the loaded PR slice.

follow_up_queries: sislib_UnkAllocData data_0 data_1 rename SisBlock next data
TExpAssignReg AssignColorReg AssignColorKonst AssignAlphaReg AssignAlphaKonst cleanup

accepted_candidate_records.title: SisLib allocator cleanup renamed address-style allocator symbols to semantic names
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2641 renamed HSD_SisLib_803A5798/HSD_SisLib_803A594C to HSD_SisLib_Alloc/HSD_SisLib_Free and updated callsites, prototypes, and symbols.txt consistently.
evidence_refs: diff:sislib.c allocator function definitions and callsites

accepted_candidate_records.title: SisLib allocation block type recovered as SisBlock
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2641 changed sislib_UnkAllocData to SisBlock and renamed fields data_0/data_1 to next/data, matching linked-list traversal and payload usage in sislib.c.

source_update_candidates.title: SisLib owns a small allocator block abstraction
source_update_candidates.text: In src/sysdolphin/baselib/sislib.{c,h}, PR #2641 presents a recovered allocator block type named SisBlock with next, data, and size fields, plus allocator helpers HSD_SisLib_Alloc and HSD_SisLib_Free.
evidence_refs: diff:sislib.h struct SisBlock and allocator prototypes
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful source-owned path fact for future SisLib work; curator should verify against current source before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: TExp helper ordering was adjusted near HSD_TExpGetType
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2641 moved TevAlloc, CnstAlloc, and HSD_TExpFree earlier in src/sysdolphin/baselib/texp.c and described this as TExp function-order adjustment.
evidence_refs: pr_body: TExp adjustments to function order
source_update_candidates.reason: Could help future TExp matching searches, but should remain a candidate path fact until checked against current source.

source_update_candidates.title: Avoid retaining stale AI or match-percentage comments as reviewable cleanup
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2641 explicitly removed unnecessary AI comments and deleted stale allocator match-percentage todo comments while preserving concrete code cleanup. This may support a standard note that AI/permuter/match-score comments should not remain unless they carry current verifier evidence.
evidence_refs: diff:sislib.c removed todo comments citing 99.40% and 92.57% match notes
source_update_candidates.reason: Potentially reusable style guidance, but one PR is not enough to promote without curator review and comparison to existing standards.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that all address-style SisLib symbols should be renamed; this PR only supports the specific allocator and list-head names shown in the diff.
Do not claim TExpAssignReg matched or improved from the loaded evidence; no bot report or objdiff result is present for texp.c.
Do not promote free_head/used_head as a global naming convention outside this SisLib allocator context.
Do not treat removed comments as proof that AI assistance was used; the PR body only says unnecessary AI comments were removed.
